CustomField.formula: IF( Post_2014_Inc_Limits_Adopted__c =false,"INCOME LIMITS PAST 2014 NOT ADOPTED", LPAD(TEXT(MONTH(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c)),2,"0")&"/"& LPAD(TEXT(DAY(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c)),2,"0")&"/"& TEXT(YEAR(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c))& " (New Income Limits Adoption Date)"& BR()& LPAD(TEXT(month(Current_Lease__r.Lease_Begin__c -90)),2,"0")&"/"& LPAD(TEXT(day(Current_Lease__r.Lease_Begin__c -90)),2,"0")&"/"& TEXT(YEAR(Current_Lease__r.Lease_Begin__c -90))& " (Current Start Date minus 90 days)"&br()& IF(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c>(Current_Lease__r.Lease_Begin__c -90),"Increases approved AFTER current lease","Increases approved BEFORE current lease")&BR()& IF(Post_2014_Inc_Adoption_Date__c>(Current_Lease__r.Lease_Begin__c -90),"MULTI-YEAR INCREASE AVAILABLE","Only current year increase available"))
CustomField.label: Adjusted Increase Year Notes
